THIS EFFORT ALSO INCLUDES ANY REQUIRED SUPPORT FOR INTEGRATION INTO THE DRRS-N / NRRE FAMILY OF SYSTEMS AS WELL AS SUPPORT TO THE AVIATION SYSTEMS AS REQUIRED, SIERRA HOTEL AVIATION READINESS PROGRAM (SHARP), AVIATION CARRIER-SIERRA HOTEL AVIATION READINESS PROGRAM (CV-SHARP), AVIATION TRAINING AND READINESS (T&R), AND AVIATION DATA WAREHOUSE (ADW). AVIATION MAINTENANCE SUPPLY READINESS REPORTING (AMSRR) IS AN AERONAUTICAL EQUIPMENT REPORTING PROGRAM PROVIDING NEAR REAL TIME MATERIAL CONDITION DATA, SUPPLY INFORMATION, MAINTENANCE ACTION REPORTS AND INFORMATION, AND EQUIPMENT HISTORICAL TREND ANALYSIS SUPPORT FOR ASHORE COMMANDS, AFLOAT COMMANDS, AND HIGHER HEADQUARTERS. THE CONTRACTOR IS RESPONSIBLE FOR PROVIDING PERSONNEL CAPABLE OF WORKING INDEPENDENTLY AND WITH DEMONSTRATED WORKING KNOWLEDGE OF THE NAVY AVIATION AND NAVY INSTALLATION PROGRAM EFFORTS, AS WELL AS THE OVERALL KNOWLEDGE OFNAVY READINESS REPORTING ENTERPRISE (NRRE) / DEFENSE READINESS REPORTING SYSTEM NAVY (DRRS-N).
